relations.subject: Rock bush quail
relations.evidence: It occurs in arid areas with scrubby grassland and thorny bushes and is seldom found above about
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: Rock bush quail
relations.evidence: Although the population has not been quantified, it is probably declining slowly, as the bird is subject to hunting pressure and destruction of its habitat
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
